watchlists.name: Energy
watchlists.description: Oil majors, midstream, utilities, nuclear, renewables, and grid-storage. Looking for value + dividend coverage; nuclear sub-bucket weighted to SMR/AI-power-demand thesis.

tickers.thesis: Permian + Guyana growth; lowest-cost integrated; 41-yr dividend raise streak.
Hess acquisition adds Guyana stake; high FCF, conservative balance sheet.
Buffett's repeat buyer; Permian pure-play; carbon-capture optionality.
Best-in-class capital discipline; double-premium drilling inventory.
Variable dividend model; Delaware basin core; FCF leverage to crude.
Refining + midstream + chemicals; mid-cycle FCF underestimated.
Largest US refiner; aggressive buybacks; MPLX dropdown value.
MLP; 8%+ yield, growing distribution, gas/NGL exposure to AI power buildout.
MLP; 25-yr distribution growth; best balance sheet among MLPs.
Largest US gas pipeline; LNG export tailwind; data-center demand.
Gas pipelines into Northeast LNG corridor; AI/data-center load growth.
Largest US renewables operator; FPL regulated utility core.
Vogtle nuclear units online; Southeast demand from data centers.
Carolinas/Florida growth; nuclear fleet; data-center load.
Independent power producer; nuclear + gas merchant exposure to AI demand.
Largest US nuclear fleet; Microsoft Three Mile Island PPA precedent.
Largest pure-play uranium producer; Cameco + Westinghouse stake.

tickers.thesis: US-made thin-film; IRA tax credit beneficiary; utility-scale backlog.

Talen Energy; Amazon data-center PPA at Susquehanna nuclear.

watchlists.name: Tesla — Confirmed Suppliers
watchlists.description: Companies named in Tesla's 10-K, earnings calls, or press as direct suppliers. Covers batteries, semis, lithium, ADAS, and casting/structural. Source linked per ticker.

tickers.thesis: Panasonic (Tokyo listing; ADR PCRFY delisted 2023); Gigafactory Nevada 2170 + 4680 cells.
LG Energy Solution; Shanghai + Berlin cell supplier.
CATL; Shanghai LFP cells; majority of Model 3/Y China.
Albemarle; lithium hydroxide long-term supply agreement.
SQM; Chilean brine lithium; long-cycle Tesla exposure via cell makers.

top_5_holders.holder: Grantham, Mayo, Van Otterloo & Co. LLC

tickers.thesis: Sigma Lithium (Brazil); replacement for Arcadium/Livent (acquired by Rio Tinto Mar-2025).
Nvidia; Dojo competitor but H100 used for FSD training cluster.
TSMC; foundry for Tesla Dojo D1 + HW4 inference chips.
STMicro; SiC MOSFETs for inverters (sole-source on Model 3 originally).
OnSemi; SiC supply agreement for traction inverters.
Aptiv; wiring harness + ADAS components historically.
Magna; supplied body panels + seats for Model S/X.
IDRA (Idra Group); Giga-press supplier for structural castings.

watchlists.name: Tesla Optimus — Speculative Suppliers
watchlists.description: Inferred from teardowns, analyst notes (Morgan Stanley, Goldman, Citi), and Chinese supply-chain reporting. Tesla has NOT published an Optimus BOM. These are educated guesses with binary outcomes — half of these probably won't pan out. Confidence score per ticker.

tickers.thesis: Harmonic Drive Systems; dominant in precision strain-wave gears for humanoid joints. Cited by Morgan Stanley Optimus note.

top_5_holders.holder: Exch TRADED CONCEPTS TRT-ROBO Global Robotics and Automation Index ETF
Artisan Partners Funds Inc.-Artisan International Small-Mid Fund
VANGUARD STAR FUNDS-Vanguard Total International Stock Index Fund
VANGUARD TAX-MANAGED FUNDS-Vanguard Developed Markets Index Fund
iShares Trust-iShares Core MSCI EAFE ETF

tickers.thesis: Sanhua Intelligent Controls; thermal management + linear actuator partner; multiple Chinese press reports of Tesla qualification.
Tuopu Group; Tesla Model 3/Y supplier, rumored Optimus actuator program.
Schaeffler AG (Frankfurt); precision bearings for humanoid joints; named in EU analyst notes.
MP Materials; US rare-earth magnets needed for actuator motors; Tesla published Optimus uses zero rare-earth magnets, so this is a HEDGE AGAINST that being walked back.
tickers.source: Tesla Investor Day 2023 contradicts; included for asymmetry

tickers.thesis: Zhejiang Rongtai; planetary roller screws for linear actuators; Chinese supply-chain reporting.
Hengdian Group DMEGC; rare-earth magnet alternative supplier.
OFILM-adjacent; vision sensor stack candidate; thin evidence.
Inovance Technology; servo drives + motors; large Chinese supplier base.
Leaderdrive Technology; harmonic reducer alternative to Harmonic Drive Systems.
